{{Infobox artifact
| name = Penance prototype
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] left prototypes of [[Penance]] scattered throughout the world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Three [[Penance]] prototypes were hidden in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A [[Penance prototype]] is tipped with a curved black triangle with a sharp [[steel]] edge and emanates death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
